heroDesc: Coordinate process review, manufacturing execution, inspection documents and delivery for prototype and low-volume projects.
sectionDesc: Choose by what the project needs next: quick validation, production preparation, metal forming or integrated delivery. Each service page explains inputs, scope and quality focus without overstating fixed results.
tipBody: Start with prototype validation when geometry is uncertain; choose production services when material, volume and acceptance criteria are clearer.

faq.title: Manufacturing Services FAQ
faq.desc: These answers help clarify fit, input files and quotation review before submitting a manufacturing request.

items.q: What projects is Manufacturing Services suitable for?
items.a: Manufacturing Services is suitable for projects that need manufacturing review based on drawings, material, quantity, tolerances and delivery goals, especially prototypes, low-volume parts and functional components.

items.q: What information is needed for a Manufacturing Services quote?
items.a: Prepare 3D files, 2D drawings when tolerances matter, material grade, quantity, finish requirements, inspection needs and target delivery timing so engineers can evaluate the route accurately.

items.q: How are lead time and cost confirmed for Manufacturing Services?
items.a: Lead time and cost are confirmed after reviewing geometry, material, process route, finishing, inspection scope and order quantity. Complex tolerances or special finishes may require engineering confirmation.

ctaTitle: Need help choosing a service route?
ctaDesc: Engineers can review drawings, materials and delivery goals before suggesting a practical manufacturing path.
